headline: 'SPACS Attack' Weekly Recap: 8 Deals, New SPACs To Watch And Headline News
summary:
The four-day trading week saw no weakness in SPAC deal announcements or headlines, all of which we followed on Benzinga's SPACS Attack show.

Here is a look back at the deals announced, some new SPACs to watch and top headlines.

headline: Tesla Stops Taking Orders For Base Versions Of Model Y: Report
summary: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) has apparently stopped taking orders for the cheapest version of its Model Y, Electrek has reported.

headline: 30,000 Macs Infected With Newly Detected Form Of Malware, Dubbed 'Silver Sparrow'
summary: Some 30,000 Mac computers have been infected with what until last week had been undetected malware, Ars Technica has reported.

headline: Tesla Stops Taking Orders for Cheapest Model Y
JD Power Dependability Survey Places Tesla Among Worst Brands In US
summary:
J.D. Power, the automotive industry's longtime monitor of quality, included Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) for the first time in its annual U.S. Vehicle Dependability Study.

What Happened: Tesla didn't have a good showing in its debut.

headline: Barron's Latest Picks And Pans: Bank Stocks, BDCs, Blackstone, Fluor, Oracle And More
summary:
This weekend's Barron's cover story explores one enterprise software company's transformation into a cloud giant.
	Other featured articles discuss who dominates the public cloud, who stands to benefit as Texas rebuilds and how to tell when tech companies are overvalued.
